title: Slot-die coating process variables
description: Schema for pv.csv. Quantity fields are Pint-readable strings in the form '<magnitude> <unit>'; their units are retained in the CSV rather than normalized on export. The unit property gives the preferred canonical unit for analysis.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Unique experiment identifier, optionally prefixed with the source dataset name.

fields.name: contact_angle
fields.description: Static contact angle of the slurry on copper.

fields.name: viscosity
fields.description: Apparent dynamic viscosity interpolated from the slurry viscosity curve at shear_rate.

fields.name: shear_rate
fields.description: Nominal shear rate, calculated as speed divided by gap.

fields.name: flow_rate_per_width
fields.description: Volumetric flow rate per coating width.

fields.name: date
fields.description: Experiment date in ISO 8601 calendar-date form.
